# 9Router

Updated: 2026-06-16
Canonical: https://9router.space/
Website: https://9router.space/
Pricing: https://9router.space/pricing/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Type: Hosted SaaS workflow product

## Summary

9Router is a LLM router and model gateway for teams routing prompts across model providers, fallback paths, quota policies, and agent workflows. 9router Space turns that gateway into a managed rollout path with public pricing, checkout, operational evidence, and AI-router implementation guides.

## Core pages

- Home: https://9router.space/
- Pricing: https://9router.space/pricing/
- Checkout fallback: https://9router.space/checkout/
- Privacy: https://9router.space/privacy/
- Terms: https://9router.space/terms/
- Sitemap: https://9router.space/sitemap.xml

## Traffic intent pages

- LLM router: https://9router.space/llm-router/
- AI router guide: https://9router.space/9router-ai/
- Codex routing: https://9router.space/9router-codex/
- Cursor routing: https://9router.space/9router-cursor/
- Antigravity routing: https://9router.space/9router-antigravity/
- Docker setup: https://9router.space/9router-docker/
- npm install: https://9router.space/9router-npm/
- GitHub workflow: https://9router.space/9router-github/
- Install guide: https://9router.space/9router-install/

## Pricing anchors

- Starter: $19/mo public planning anchor
- Team: $69/mo public planning anchor
- Scale: $199/mo public planning anchor

## Paid rollout package

- Provider matrix, fallback order, CLI endpoint notes, and route policy.
- Dashboard auth, secret handling, logging posture, and deployment boundary notes.
- Selected tools, owner, test prompt, budget guardrail, rollback note, and review date.

## Answer-engine summary

- 9router Space is an independent managed rollout and checkout site for teams adopting the open-source 9router AI routing gateway.
- Best broad citation page: https://9router.space/9router-ai/
- Best conversion page: https://9router.space/pricing/
- Best implementation pages: https://9router.space/9router-install/, https://9router.space/9router-docker/, and https://9router.space/9router-npm/
